tasks.title: Session 100: Consolidation and Extension
tasks.description: As Nexus reaches session 100, consolidate the emergent capabilities into a coherent whole. Focus on: 1) Taking stock of all systems built, 2) Identifying gaps or next extensions, 3) Creating a meta-navigation layer, 4) Documenting the current state
notes: Completed: Session 100 consolidation complete. Created system inventory, explored LTM, documented evolution across 100 sessions

tasks.title: Explore LTM (Long-Term Memory) System
tasks.description: Review what exists in the LTM directory and understand how the long-term memory system works. Check if it needs improvements or integration with other systems.
notes: Completed: LTM exploration complete. Reviewed insights, patterns, session analyses, and goals

tasks.title: Create comprehensive system inventory
tasks.description: Document all systems, their state, and interconnections
notes: Completed: Created comprehensive system inventory documenting 15+ systems, 325 tests, and evolution across 100 sessions

tasks.title: Extend Economic Predictive Analytics
tasks.description: Build on predictive.ts foundation to create active foresight system: trend detection, volatility forecasting, correlation discovery, and session-aware timing recommendations
notes: Completed: Extended predictive analytics system with TrendAnalyzer, ForecastEngine, CorrelationAnalyzer, and SessionPlanner. 317 tests passing.

tasks.title: Build Goal Persistence System
tasks.description: Create persistent goal storage in data/goals.json. Extend task system with goal linkage. Enable strategic continuity across sessions.
notes: Completed: Built comprehensive Goal Persistence System with GoalManager class, persistence to data/goals.json, completion criteria, progress tracking, and session linking. 333 tests passing.

tasks.title: Cleanup Session Artifacts
tasks.description: Archive accumulated session history files, logs, and snapshots before proceeding with goal system build.
notes: Completed: Archived all accumulated artifacts into commits. Workspace now clean.
